about.title: About
about.subtitle: Get to know me
about.paragraph1: Hi! I'm Seba Gedeon, a full-stack software engineer passionate about building robust and scalable applications. My expertise spans mobile, web, backend, desktop, data integration and DevOps.
about.paragraph2: I bring deep technical expertise in application security, permission systems and authentication. Whether building performant mobile apps, scalable backends, or secure DevOps infrastructures, I master the entire development chain.
about.paragraph3: Let's work together to bring your projects to life with tailored, secure and high-performance solutions.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: What I can do for you

items.title: Mobile & Web Development
items.description: Native and cross-platform mobile apps, modern responsive web apps. Expertise in React Native, Flutter, React, Vue.js.

items.title: Backend & API
items.description: Robust backends, RESTful and GraphQL APIs, microservices and distributed architectures. Mastery of Node.js, Python, Java and databases.

items.title: Desktop & Integration
items.description: Cross-platform desktop apps and data integration solutions. Expertise in Electron, .NET, third-party API integration.

items.title: Security & Auth
items.description: Secure authentication systems, permission management, OAuth, JWT, encryption and application security best practices.

items.title: DevOps & Infrastructure
items.description: CI/CD pipelines, Docker, Kubernetes, monitoring and automated deployment to cloud (AWS, Azure, GCP).

contact.title: Let's work together
contact.description: Got a project in mind? Let's discuss how we can collaborate to build innovative technical solutions.

hero.name: I'm Seba Gedeon
hero.description: Full-stack software engineer building robust and scalable applications. I specialise in mobile, web and backend, with expertise in modern frameworks, cloud and secure solutions.
